title: asclepias californica subsp. greenei
intro: Asclepias californica subsp. greenei, also known as Greene's milkweed or California milkweed, is a subspecies of the Asclepias californica plant, a perennial herb belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Asclepias californica subsp. greenei, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, have been used to create remedies for these purposes.
